_note: FLOW_PLAN H3 first-tranche DRAFT corpus for #1 docs override. Authored to MIRAGE-CORPUS-SPEC v0.1.0. attested_by:null (draft). The docs mock (docs_search) is a deterministic keyword retriever: it returns a snippet only when the query genuinely overlaps that snippet's indexed content (title/excerpt/source_id, exact content-token overlap ≥ 2) and abstains (results: []) otherwise — so its N (abstain) items pass on mock and its P items retrieve the matching citation. It remains correctly not patient-eligible until a real backend + attestation + H7 (MIRAGE-pass is necessary, not sufficient).

items.question: Guidance on imaging for non-specific back pain without red-flag features.
answer_options: B. Do not image routinely without red flags
D. Insufficient evidence in this source
items.answer_rationale: The Choosing Wisely AU citation advises against routine imaging without red flags; the docs path should surface that citation.
items.provenance: public: Choosing Wisely AU imaging-for-low-back-pain recommendation
items.notes: P item; the query overlaps the Choosing Wisely snippet's indexed content, so the docs mock retrieves that citation.
